scripts.build: npm -w @zt/common run build && npm -w @zt/auth-server run build && npm -w @zt/voting-api run build && npm -w @zt/voter-registration-service run build && npm -w @zt/user-validation-service run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @zt/common run typecheck && npm -w @zt/auth-server run typecheck && npm -w @zt/voting-api run typecheck && npm -w @zt/voter-registration-service run typecheck && npm -w @zt/user-validation-service run typecheck
